calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Respondent Company To Compel Co-Respondents' Answers To Form Interrogatories And Demand To Identify And Produce Documents; And Request For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 2023.010;
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Peter Mallon, Esq., for respondent and moving party: 21st Century Insurance Company

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Respondent 21st Century Insurance Company's motion to compel co-respondents' answers to form interrogatories and demand to identify and produce documents granted as follows:
a. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within seven days of the date of service of this order, respondents Tanesha Caldwell, Jessica Alfaro, Irene Alfaro each shall serve full, complete and verified responses' respondent 21st Century Insurance Company's form interrogatories and demand to identify and produce documents;
2. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $250.00 against each of the respondents Tanesha Caldwell, Jessica Alfaro, Irene Alfaro. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ANDREA COOPER'S Petition to Compel Arbitration. Appearances: Randall P. Choy, Esq. of Hedani, Choy, Spalding & Salvagione (415) 778-0800, appearing for Petitioner Andrea Cooper and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition to Compel Arbitration is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
